items.next_action: Await direct owner review in the built-in Forge viewport. Present the reference against the three visible negative controls with no preselected pair, outcome, or confidence. Accept only a deliberate owner submission; do not infer an observation, approval, promotion, population preference, external execution, or protected-Kernel mutation.
items.proof: The capability-free reference-viewport and viewport-stimulus modules bind one exact reference plus three deliberate controls to six P7b pairs. A blank-by-default owner form now produces one deterministic CreativeDirector/ProjectDirection receipt only after a direct action bound to the current base fingerprint. Stale fingerprints, not_observed, hidden pairs, and confidence outside 1-100 fail closed. Nine module tests, twenty-six desktop tests, the UI build, and the full Forge gate pass; the receipt has authority_effect none and does not persist approval or mutate the protected Kernel.
